message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing true
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "./zbox sp-pay-interests" as ZBOX
participant "gosdk" as GOSDK

ZBOX -> GOSDK : StakePoolPayInterests(blobberID)

GOSDK -> GOSDK : check initialized sdk

alt [empty blobber id]
  GOSDK -> GOSDK : get client id
end

GOSDK -> GOSDK : create stake pool request
GOSDK -> GOSDK : create smart contract txn data
GOSDK -> GOSDK : send smart contract txn value fee

@enduml
